# terrible_vmware_vmware_vm_list_group_by_clusters_info (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `detailed_vms` (Boolean) If *true* gather detailed information about virtual machines.

### Read-Only

- `vm_list_group_by_clusters_info` (String) Dictionary of vm list by folders and clusters.
